mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tasks (team_id, creator_id, assignee_id, title, description, difficulty, priority, est_hours, deadline, progress, status, required_skills_json, risk_level, delay_probability, version) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{creatorId}, #{assigneeId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{difficulty}, #{priority}, #{estHours}, #{deadline}, #{progress}, #{status}, #{requiredSkillsJson}, #{riskLevel}, #{delayProbability}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE tasks SET assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, priority = #{priority}, est_hours = #{estHours}, deadline = #{deadline}, progress = #{progress}, status = #{status}, required_skills_json = #{requiredSkillsJson}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE tasks SET status = #{newStatus}, progress = CASE WHEN #{newStatus} = 'COMPLETED' THEN 100 ELSE progress END, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE tasks SET progress = #{progress}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE tasks SET assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE tasks SET risk_level = #{riskLevel}, delay_probability = #{delayProbability}, last_risk_eval_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(est_hours * (1 - progress / 100.0)), 0) FROM tasks WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId} AND status IN ('CREATED', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'SUSPENDED')
